events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the upside-down, uncalibrated click wrench makes applied torque unverifiable, so the fastening work fails as non-compliant/installed-defective. Required actions are stopping work, quarantining the tool, and re-torquing affected fasteners with a correctly used, calibrated wrench per OEM spec before resuming.
